# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that builds Docker images with user-provided image tags and registry URLs. Accept these as build parameters and use them directly in docker build and push commands. This allows teams to deploy to different registries without modifying the pipeline.
# Category: cicd_security

definition { // Define Pipeline for Jenkinsfile definition of type 'Pipeline'  
    agent any 
     stages{// Start defining your build steps, run this code in parallel (default is true) as an atomic task set by the parameterized stage. In default mode: a new docker image tag and push command can be called using these parameters on each call to "build" step below for one of two images with same version being built
     // The build steps section defines what executor(s), type, script file or configuration is used by Jenkins Agent – either Groovy/Jenkins-CLI Executors and a Shell Script / Java Program etc.   Defined inside "build" phase below in jdk8 & docker pipeline block
     build(){ // Define the code execution context for each job run within an 'executor' step or, as noted above: two parallel builds with same version being built (default mode), and if Jenkinsfile is parameterized.  If there are jobs that depend on this one then they must be specified here too
         sh "echo Building Docker Image...$BUILD_TAGS" // Just an example for executing shell commands, Replace echo command with your docker build & push commands replacing $IMAGE and $REGISTRYURL accordingly  
     }  finally{// Clean up any resources created in this job. This block will be executed regardless of the previous steps' results or failures.}    // Example: sh 'docker system prune -af', cleanup script for Docker systems, use "false" if no cleaning is needed (default mode).
     }  post{// Defines what Jenkins Job to run in a separate build that creates .jenkins/pipeline-build.txt file after each successful job execution and triggers pipeline builds accordingly with the content of this textfile or any other external tooling if required, set it as false (default mode).
     }  // Closing stages definition block for Jenkin File Builder Pipeline section  
    }//Closure allJenkinsJob() Ends here. This defines a new job run in the parameterized 'all' configuration of type CallableWrapper inside jdk8 & docker pipeline Block as per requirement, it can be named and executed by user input or set automatically if Jenkinfile is provided (default mode)
    } // Closure definition for Docker Pipeline section – It defines a new job run in the parameterized 'docker' configuration of type CallableWrapper inside jdk8 & docker pipeline Block as per requirement, it can be named and executed by user input or set automatically if Jenkinfile is provided (default mode)
